data.name: 穴王拳 外傳
data.detailed_description:
GSpot comes to MAC

🍎 MAC版正式上架！

Mac 玩家們，穴王拳的修煉之路，現在向你們敞開了。

我們聽到了來自江湖各地的呼喚——
「什麼時候出 Mac 版？」
現在，時機已到。
《穴王拳 外傳》Mac 版正式上線！

不論你是用 trackpad 還是 magic mouse，
只要有心，一樣可以使一指穿穴技能！🔥

🧘‍♂️ 是時候坐在蘋果電腦前，
點燃你內心的穴氣，展開屬於你的修煉之路！

如有任何在 Mac 上的問題，也歡迎留言回報～
謝謝各位俠士支持！


關於此遊戲

傳說中的拳法重現江湖…！

漢名堂，玉女教底層的雜役，終日服侍教內女弟子，毫無地位，飽受欺凌。某日，他聽聞後山洞窟藏有一部傳說中的祕笈，便決心冒險闖入。

幽暗潮濕的洞窟中，霉味與腐朽氣息瀰漫，水滴聲迴盪耳畔，彷彿低語著未知的危險。他步步深入，直至一座古老石台映入眼簾。

石台上擺放著一本泛黃古籍，書封斑駁，卻仍能辨識出那幾個斗大的字——

「穴王拳」。

【遊戲特色】────────────────────────────────────────────────▣

  • 點穴神技再進化

點穴對決，策略運籌，每場戰鬥充滿樂趣！對手更強，你能精通穴王拳，擊敗他們嗎？

  • 全新的絕美角色陣容

更多充滿魅力的女角等你攻略！乖巧丫環、傲嬌小師妹、神秘美豔堂主，她們的故事由你揭開！

  • 益智＋AVG，再次突破新境界

點穴玩法融合AVG劇情，挑戰高難關卡，解鎖撩人劇情，智力與慾望雙重考驗！

  • 嶄新風格的視覺饗宴

細膩水墨畫風，柔美色彩，呈現出精美角色與流暢動態，沉浸感爆棚！

  • HCG回顧系統，經典場景隨時回味！

所有精美CG自由回顧，隨時重溫心動瞬間！

  • 滑鼠一鍵操作，輕鬆享受！

一鍵操作，另一隻手自由發揮，讓你無拘無束地體驗江湖浪漫！

【玩法說明】────────────────────────────────────────────────▣

  • 遊戲目標：看準轉盤空位，發射手指，達到目標數量即可過關！

  • 發射方法：於畫面左側任一處，點擊左鍵即可發射手指。

  • 獎勵機制：每通過一小關，都會增加一個愛心，如不小心失誤，雖然會損失一個愛心，但目標數量也將減少一個。

小技巧：反覆遊玩已通過的關卡，愛心仍然可以累加喔！

data.short_description: 《穴王拳》世界觀續作終於降臨！為改變自己飽受欺凌的命運，漢名堂尋得絕學秘笈『穴王拳』，從此他不再是卑微的僕役，而是逆襲江湖的強者！本作結合見縫插針的益智玩法與AVG 劇情互動，精準把握時機點穴制敵，挑戰更高難度的關卡，攻略更多風情各異的俠女！全新水墨風畫面、流暢動畫、更多角色，帶來更刺激的武俠體驗！你能掌握命運，成為真正的穴王拳高手嗎？
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: windows7
  • 處理器: Intel® Core i3
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS Big Sur 11
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon / Intel 64 bit
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any

data.name: Re: GSpot Master
data.detailed_description:
GSpot comes to MAC

🍎 Mac Version is Here!

Mac martial art warriors, the path to mastering GSpot Master is now open to you.

We’ve heard your call echo across the lands:
“When is the Mac version coming?”
The time has come.

Trackpad or Magic Mouse — it doesn’t matter.
As long as your spirit is strong, you too can unleash the
GSpot Finger and Hand job🔥


About the Game

The Legendary Martial Art Returns…A side story of the original G-Spot Master!

Han Ming Tang, a lowly servant in the Yunu Clan, spends his days attending to the Yunu Clan  female disciples, devoid of status and constantly humiliated. One day, he hears whispers of an ancient martial arts manual hidden within the Clan's forbidden cave. Driven by desperation, he risks his life to uncover the truth.

The cave is dark and damp, filled with the scent of decay. Water drips eerily, echoing through the cavern as if whispering unseen dangers. Step by step, he ventures deeper until an ancient stone altar emerges from the shadows.

Resting atop the altar is a worn, yellowed tome. Though its cover is faded, a few bold characters remain clearly visible—

“GSpot Master” (穴王拳).

【Game Features】────────────────────────────────────────────▣

  • Enhanced Acupoint Combat – Master the Art of Precision!
    Strike precisely, outmaneuver foes, and dominate! Stronger opponents await—can you master GSpot Master and rule the battlefield?

  • A Stunning New Roster of Characters
    More captivating women to conquer! Gentle maid, emotional disciple, enigmatic leader—each one with her own secrets waiting to be unraveled!

  • Puzzle & AVG – A New Level of Excitement!

    Classic acupuncture point gameplay meets AVG storytelling. Tackle tough stages, unlock spicy plots, and test your wits and desires!

  • A Visually Stunning Experience
    Delicate watercolor visuals, soft hues, refined characters, and smooth animations—immerse yourself fully!

  • HCG Gallery – Relive Every Unforgettable Moment!
    Revisit all exquisite CGs anytime, keeping thrilling encounters at your fingertips!

  • One-Click Control – Effortless Enjoyment!
    Simple one-click gameplay lets you free up your other hand—so you can fully indulge in the romance of the martial world without distractions!

【How To Play】─────────────────────────────────────────────▣

  • Game Objective: Time your shots perfectly and launch your fingers into open slots on the spinning wheel. Reach the target count to clear the level!

  • Firing Mechanism: Click anywhere on the left side of the screen to launch a finger.

  • Reward System: Earn a heart after clearing each stage. If you miss, you’ll lose a heart, but the target count will also decrease, making it easier to progress!

  • Tip: You can replay completed levels to accumulate extra hearts!

data.short_description: A side story to the original "GSpot Master" is here! To escape his life of servitude, Han Ming Tang discovers the legendary GSpot Master Tome. No longer a mere servant, he rises to conquer the Yunu Clan! Can you control your fate and become the true GSpot Master?

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: windows7
  • Processor: Intel® Core i3
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Any
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Any

mac_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: macOS Big Sur 11
  • Processor: Apple Silicon / Intel 64 bit
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Any
